task_completion.description: Verify the survey 'PTO Request Form 2024' is created and activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey dashboard or survey list showing 'PTO Request Form 2024' with an 'Active' status indicator (usually a green checkmark, active status badge, or 'Stop survey' button indicating it is currently running).

task_completion.description: Verify a question group named 'Leave Details' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey structure menu or group list showing a group titled 'Leave Details'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Start Date' and 'Return Date' questions exist with correct codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey structure or question list showing 'Start Date' with code 'start' and 'Return Date' with code 'return'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Return Date' question has validation logic ensuring it is after the start date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question settings or logic panel for 'Return Date' showing a validation equation that references both 'return' and 'start' (e.g., checking that return > start or using strtotime comparisons).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Duration Calculation' question uses ExpressionScript to calculate days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question settings for 'Duration Calculation' (code 'calc_days') showing an equation containing 'strtotime', '-', and '86400' to calculate the difference between the two dates.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Medical Certificate' file upload question appears only if duration is > 3 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question settings for 'Medical Certificate' (code 'med_cert') showing the relevance equation 'calc_days > 3' and the question type set to File Upload.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the logic was entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ExpressionScript and validation logic must be visible inside LimeSurvey input fields, not just typed into a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display the standard LimeSurvey UI elements (menus, sidebars, save buttons) rather than mockups or copy-pasted text from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'PTO Request Form 2024'. Expected Question Codes: 'start', 'return', 'calc_days', 'med_cert'. Validation Logic: Must reference both 'start' and 'return' to ensure return date is after start date. Calculation Logic: Must use 'strtotime', '86400', and '-' to calculate the day difference. Relevance Logic: Must use 'calc_days', '>', and '3' for the Medical Certificate question.
